---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working the way it should
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Describe the bug

A clear, concise description of what's broken.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Run `...`
2. Click on `...`
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages or stack traces in a code block:

```
paste output here
```

## Environment

- Hooplytics version: <!-- e.g. 0.1.2, or commit SHA -->
- Python version: <!-- output of `python --version` -->
- OS: <!-- macOS / Linux / Windows + version -->
- Surface: <!-- CLI / Streamlit / Jupyter -->
- Install method: <!-- pip install -e ., pip install hooplytics, etc. -->

## Additional context

Screenshots, the model bundle you were using, or anything else that might help diagnose the issue.

## Checklist

- [ ] I've searched [existing issues](https://github.com/texasbe2trill/hooplytics/issues?q=is%3Aissue) and this isn't a duplicate.
- [ ] I'm running a recent version of Hooplytics.
- [ ] I've redacted any API keys or personal data from logs.
